summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 4 - JWT authentication, plumbing/electrical layers, DXF export, and project management features. All major functionality working excellently with 100% backend API success and 95% frontend success rate.

ui_bugs.issue: Room selection clicks intercepted by electrical layer SVG overlay when electrical layer is active
ui_bugs.workaround: Toggle off electrical layer before selecting rooms

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (21/21 passed) - 100% success rate
JWT Authentication: User registration with new user account creation
JWT Authentication: Admin login (admin@vastuplan.com / admin123)
JWT Authentication: User logout and session management
JWT Authentication: Protected route access control (unauthenticated users redirected to /login)
JWT Authentication: Token-based API access with Bearer tokens
Project generation with AI (Claude Sonnet 4.5) - generated 16 rooms successfully
Project CRUD operations: create, read, update, delete with user ownership
Plumbing layer functionality: 15 plumbing elements generated and displayed
Electrical layer functionality: 54 electrical elements generated and displayed
Layer toggles: ARCH/PLMB/ELEC buttons working correctly
Plumbing elements: draggable pipes, tanks (OT/UG), taps, drains, showers
Electrical elements: draggable sockets, switches, lights, fans, AC points
Export dropdown: PDF Blueprint, DXF (AutoCAD), Print A3 Sheet options
PDF export: Downloads PDF file successfully
DXF export: Downloads .dxf file for AutoCAD
Project list: Shows saved projects with metadata (2 projects found)
Project management: Load saved projects functionality
New user experience: Empty project list for new users
Vastu scoring: Overall score 69/100 with detailed room-level scores
Vastu analysis: Room direction calculation and warnings
AI Copilot: Chat interface and architectural assistance
Cost estimation: Complete BOQ with area calculations
Tab navigation: Floor Plan and Cost Estimate tabs
User interface: Professional design with proper spacing and typography
Navigation: Login/Register page transitions
Session management: Logout redirects to login page
